This movement is in the correct direction (downward). The heuristic checks already passed, including direction_consistent. So the movement is plausible.

No issues with round numbers (-336 is not a round anchor). The reasoning seems consistent with the vector and profile.

The direction is correct, no opposite movement. So no rewrite required.
